# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Sign in"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="main" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
          "Welcome back"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="form" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="action" value="/login"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="method" value="post"}]
          "\n"
          element ns=html local="label" attrs=[]
            "Email"
            element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="email"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="name" value="email"}]
          "\n"
          element ns=html local="label" attrs=[]
            "Password"
            element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="password"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="name" value="password"}]
          "\n"
          element ns=html local="button" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="submit"}]
            "Sign in"
          "\n"
        "\n"
      "\n"
